title: Basic Labor Rights Foreign Workers Should Check
subtitle: Before starting a job in Korea, review your contract, wage terms, working hours, and workplace safety rules.
bullets: Confirm wage, overtime, and payday details.
Ask for help if wages are unpaid or unsafe work occurs.
llama_rule: Focus on labor rights, wages, employment contracts, working hours, workplace safety, minimum wage, industrial accidents, or unpaid wages.
Each bullet must be short, practical, and action-oriented.
Do not say that a worker is definitely eligible for compensation or a legal remedy.
Encourage checking official sources or contacting a qualified labor office/support center when needed.
Do not include employer accusations unless the source is official and specific.
Do not include system or operation messages.
